headline:
Business mindset,
not just writing code.
skill-1-text: The tech world never stands still. I quickly master new languages, frameworks, and tools to stay relevant and effective.
skill-2-text: I write clean, readable, and maintainable code. For me, it's not just about making things work, but building them sustainably.
skill-3-text: Software is built by people for people. I value feedback, communicate clearly, and ask the right questions so we move forward together.
skill-4-text: I don't just look for "work," but an environment to grow. I strive to build scalable solutions that last, not just temporary patches.
subheadline: Technology changes, but the right mindset remains. I believe good software isn't just syntax—it's a tool to solve real problems and create value.
